description: Style NoteTraditional weaving techniques passed on from generation to generation have been used to create this lovely fabindia sari. The brand collaborates with rural craftspeople to produce pieces created from ancient Indian techniques. This sari captures the essence of ethnic Indian grace and fuses it with the minimalistic mood of the moment. Style it with statement terracotta jewellery and earthy sandals. Product DetailsWhite sari with grey Kota print all overMaterial and CareCottonDry cleanSizeLength: 5.4 metres (approximate)
